Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Approving Settlement Of Private Attorneys General Act Claims
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS EMMMANUELA GREENBLATT and NICOLE CAHILL'S motion for approval of settlement of PAGA claims is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed.
